title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.276 - Sections 375.256 to 375.271 not to abridge right to serve process in other legal manner
text:
375.276.  Sections 375.256 to 375.271 not to abridge right to serve process in other legal manner. — Nothing herein contained shall limit or abridge the right of the plaintiff to serve any process, notice or demand upon any insurance company, association, or other insurer in any other manner now or hereafter permitted by law.
(L. 1951 p. 276 § 375.164, A.L. 1967 p. 516)
